title: Thailand Rolls Out Measures to Promote EV Development
content: Thailand is pressing ahead with efforts to develop its electric vehicle (EV) industry, aiming to become a fully integrated manufacturing hub for EVs and key components in the ASEAN region. The initiative supports national goals of achieving carbon neutrality by 2050 and net-zero greenhouse gas emissions by 2065. Under the â€œ30@30â€ policy, the country aims for zero-emission vehicles to make up at least 30% of total passenger car and pickup truck outputâ€”about 725,000 unitsâ€”by 2030, alongside 675,000 electric motorcycles.
author: Analysts Account
